title: Youtube poop: You guys should call me Flyborg!
description:
ok I was searching for things to poop when I stumble on a youtube channel that had a link to all the episodes of teeny titerins in WMV format so I thought "what the hell! I make a poop in fact Im going to let everyone on the youchewpoop forums know about this site" you might see more teeny titerins poop from other users now thanks to me for finding the website I you want to know it PM me and I will give you the link! I had alot of fun while making this even though it was made at 5:00 in the morning so I fell asleep after that! Enjoy the poop!
